prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/330-deck.key in Keynote. Insert the image ~/Desktop/kinbench/330-photo.jpg into the current slide (Insert menu > Choose…, or drag the image into the slide). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'keynote add_image 1 ~/Desktop/kinbench/330-photo.jpg'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/330-image-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
